summary: Strip whole-page apparatus from page-as-chunk SBE texts (Plotinus, Zhuangzi)

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content:
Two page-as-chunk SBE texts bundle whole apparatus PAGES as chunks (not in-chunk apparatus like Yasna, so pre_strip can't fix it — needs a whole-chunk DROP):

- plotinus-select-works-index (716 raw pages -> 828 chunks): Porphyry's 'Life of Plotinus' biography + MacKenna's tractate TOC/summaries interleaved with the Ennead 'Section N' primary text.
- zhuangzi-inner-chapters-index (141 raw pages -> 294 chunks): Legge's per-book editorial prefaces ('BOOK N. TITLE. ...'), patriarch-history notes, Babylonian comparative notes, philological glosses; ALSO the Tao Te Ching is duplicated here (TTC chapters appear both under tao-te-ching-legge AND inside this id).

Fix: extend is_apparatus_chunk() in scripts/chunk.py (the existing whole-chunk drop test) to recognize these apparatus page-types with false-positive guards (dropping real scripture would be bad). Separately dedupe the TTC (decide canonical id; likely drop the zhuangzi-bundled TTC copy).

Re-ingest implication (same as Yasna fix ca2bc29): after re-chunk, clear stale nodes/embeddings/staged_edges/staged_tags/edges for the affected ids, then graph_bootstrap + embed_corpus + tag_concepts + propose_edges. Yasna footprint for reference was 148 chunks -> 1148 staged_edges + 1936 staged_tags + 1991 live edges, all apparatus-polluted.
